entity.name: PurchaseConfig

one-to-one.name: company
one-to-one.title: Company
one-to-one.help: Company for which the configurations are made.

integer.name: purchaseOrderInAtiSelect
integer.title: Purchase orders ATI/WT
integer.help: It is possible to choose whether quotations/orders are always established excluding tax, always including tax, by default excluding tax, or by default including tax. The by default excluding tax and by default including tax options allow case-by-case modification (via a checkbox).

string.name: purchaseOrderSupplierBox
string.title: Supplier box in purchase order
string.help: This field allows you to customize a box with information of your choice on quotation/order printings using an HTML field.

boolean.name: displayPriceOnQuotationRequest
boolean.title: Display price on requested purchase printing
boolean.help: This field allows displaying the purchase price recorded on the product form (supplier catalog price) on a quotation request (supplier quotation printing).

boolean.name: displayBuyerOnPrinting
boolean.title: Display buyer on printing
boolean.help: On quotation/order printing, displays the buyer name.

boolean.name: displayProductCodeOnPrinting
boolean.title: Display product code on printing
boolean.help: On quotation/order printing, displays the product code.

boolean.name: displayTaxDetailOnPrinting
boolean.title: Display tax detail on printing
boolean.help: On quotation/order printing, displays the tax details (name, rate, and amount).

boolean.name: displaySupplierCodeOnPrinting
boolean.title: Display supplier code on printing
boolean.help: On quotation/order printing, displays the supplier code.

boolean.name: displayProductDetailOnPrinting
boolean.title: Display product detail on printing
boolean.help: On quotation/order printing, displays the product description from the product form.

string.name: priceRequest
string.title: Message for requesting prices
string.help: Allows customizing a default message on quotation requests, which will appear on the printing.

boolean.name: isAnalyticDistributionRequired
boolean.title: Analytic distribution required on purchase order line
boolean.help: If this option is enabled, it is mandatory that on each order line (Analytics tab), the Analytic distribution template field is filled in.

many-to-one.name: purchaseOrderPrintTemplate
many-to-one.title: Purchase order template
many-to-one.help: You can define here the default printing template for the company purchase quotations/orders.
